_meta.summary: Placeholder Byzantine card data for issue #11. Real data is blocked on issue #17 (OCR of image-only Byzantines_Base_EN.pdf). Do NOT balance, playtest, or reason about gameplay against these numbers — they are invented to make a 2-player MVP-1 lobby launchable, not to represent the Byzantine faction.
do_not: extend with more fake cards (one unit + one civ is enough for MVP-1)
reference these in card-handler logic in @eoe/rules
